class.name: AudioStreamNative
class.brief_description: Audio stream decoded by the host operating system's native media APIs.
class.description: Holds a compressed audio buffer (WebM/MP4/Ogg/WAV/MKV) and plays it back through whichever OS-native decoder is available on the build platform: [codeblock] Windows -> Media Foundation Linux -> GStreamer macOS / iOS -> AVFoundation Android -> MediaCodec Web -> WebCodecs [/codeblock] If no native backend is installed at runtime (e.g. a Linux box without GStreamer), the stream stays silent and reports zero length. Pair with [VideoStreamNative] when the source has both an audio and a video track.

method.name: load_from_buffer
method.description: Creates a new [AudioStreamNative] from an in-memory container buffer. [param hint] is a container-format hint; pass [code]0[/code] (auto-detect) unless the OS decoder is failing to guess.

method.name: load_from_file
method.description: Convenience wrapper that reads the file at [param path] into memory and calls [method load_from_buffer].

members.member: Container-format hint for the OS decoder. Defaults to Auto.
Raw bytes of the compressed container.
If [code]true[/code], the playback restarts from [member loop_offset] when the end of stream is reached.
Seconds from start to which the stream seeks when looping.
